expectations.text: Sets acceptedDocuments to [IdCard(region: .us), DriverLicense(region: .us)] — does NOT put passports in acceptedDocuments
expectations.evidence: Lines 46-49: settings.acceptedDocuments = [IdCard(region: .us), DriverLicense(region: .us)]. No Passport in acceptedDocuments.

expectations.text: Sets rejectedDocuments to contain Passport — does NOT use acceptedDocuments to exclude passports
expectations.evidence: Lines 52-54: settings.rejectedDocuments = [Passport(region: .any)]. Passport is correctly placed in rejectedDocuments, not excluded via acceptedDocuments.

expectations.text: Does NOT confuse acceptedDocuments and rejectedDocuments — wanted documents go in acceptedDocuments, unwanted in rejectedDocuments
expectations.evidence: US IdCard and DriverLicense (wanted) are in acceptedDocuments; Passport (unwanted) is in rejectedDocuments. The two arrays are not swapped or conflated.
